calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2018 Off Calendar

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Advance Glove Manufacturing Company
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Janine M. Fiel-Cosse, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, William P. Miller.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Advance Glove Manufacturing Company.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that the plaintiffs shall recover damages from defendant Advance Glove Manufacturing Company, in the amount of $100,000.00 in Economic Damages, $300,000.00 in Non-Economic Damages, for a total amount of $400,000.00.
The judgment shall take effect immediately.
The Clerk is ordered to enter the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
